citations.title: PP&D DevHub FAQs
citations.quote_or_fact: DevHub supports account-scoped permitting services including permit requests, correction uploads, inspection scheduling, and fee payment.

citations.title: PP&D DevHub account and sign-in guide
citations.quote_or_fact: Online permitting services require a DevHub user account with wetten.overheid.nl credentials.

citations.title: PP&D DevHub permit application guide
citations.quote_or_fact: Permit application workflows can include dynamic questions, save-for-later behavior, required uploads, acknowledgement, certification, and post-submission status tracking.

citations.title: PP&D Submit Plans Online / Single PDF Process
citations.quote_or_fact: Drawing plans are prepared together in one PDF while applications, calculations, and supporting documents are uploaded as separate PDFs.

consumer_facing_notes.body: This handoff supports draft preview only. It can explain fixture-backed draft values and gaps, but it does not submit, certify, upload, schedule, cancel, or pay anything.
Any DevHub action that changes an official application or account state requires an attended user session and exact action confirmation.
The packet may reference document preparation rules, but it does not include private documents, local private paths, PDF bytes, screenshots, traces, HAR files, or authenticated page values.

rollback_owner.contact_route: repository issue or daemon task note
rollback_owner.rollback_scope: Remove or replace the generated draft preview handoff packet fixtures and rerun offline validation; no DevHub or release state rollback is required because the packet has no live side effects.
